Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.name: orientation
Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.abstract: Image orientation, Angles0 means head at the top, other angles mean counterlockwise rotation

Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.name: resultedImageOrientation
Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.abstract: Resulting image orientation. If it matches the orientation then image will be returned in the same orientation.

Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.name: isMirrored
Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.abstract: If YES, then the resulted image will be mirrored

Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.name: needAlphaInOutput
Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.abstract: TODO: Add support to return YUV with Alpha. Returns BGRA since YUV-Alpha is not supported yet

Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.name: overrideOutputToBGRA
Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.abstract: Input image format determines output image format, conversion takes time. EffectPlayer produces images in RGBA, if you request BGRA the time to get BGRA is minimal.

Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.name: outputTexture
Structs/EpImageFormat.html#/c:@SA@EpImag.abstract: Omit conversion, returned pixel buffer is the CVPixelBuffer which is associated with Rendered Texture. The buffer type is BGRA, but texture is RGBA, so if such buffer is drawn without additional processing its colors will look unpredictably.

Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.name: orientation
Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.abstract: Image orientation, Angles0 means head at the top, other angles mean counterlockwise rotation

Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.name: resultedImageOrientation
Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.abstract: Resulting image orientation. If it matches the orientation then image will be returned in the same orientation.

Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.name: isMirrored
Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.abstract: If YES, then the resulted image will be mirrored

Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.name: needAlphaInOutput
Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.abstract: TODO: Add support to return YUV with Alpha. Returns BGRA since YUV-Alpha is not supported yet

Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.name: overrideOutputToBGRA
Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.abstract: Input image format determines output image format, conversion takes time. EffectPlayer produces images in RGBA, if you request BGRA the time to get BGRA is minimal.

Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.name: outputTexture
Type%20Definitions/EpImageFormat/EpImage.abstract: Omit conversion, returned pixel buffer is the CVPixelBuffer which is associated with Rendered Texture. The buffer type is BGRA, but texture is RGBA, so if such buffer is drawn without additional processing its colors will look unpredictably.
